answers: Vegetarian diet excludes meat but may include dairy and eggs. Easier transition than vegan, still very healthy.
Vegetarian protein: eggs, dairy, lentils, beans, tofu, paneer, nuts, seeds. Combine grains + legumes for complete protein.
Benefits: lower heart disease risk, lower cholesterol, better digestion, and reduced environmental impact.
Niramish khabar: dal, chholar dal, paneer, dim, doodh, tofu, nuts — shob diye protein pawa jay. Bhat-dal-shobji best combo.
